mapper.select: SELECT driver_id, driver_name, DATEDIFF(${columnName}, now()) expireDay FROM t_driver;
select * from t_driver where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and driver_name = #{driverName} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
select count(1) from t_driver where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
